The model rates USA as the marginal favorite with a 44% win probability, while Paraguay holds a 25% chance of victory. The 19-percentage-point gap reflects USA's slight edge, but the outcome remains genuinely competitive rather than one-sided.

The draw emerges as the likeliest single outcome at 31%, suggesting the match could easily settle level. The three-way spread—with no outcome commanding overwhelming probability—indicates a closely contested fixture where either team can plausibly prevail or stalemate. Paraguay's quarter-chance at outright victory underscores the competitive nature of the pairing on a neutral surface.

The model and sportsbook consensus track closely across all three outcomes, with gaps of 2 percentage points or less. Polymarket prices align similarly. The broad agreement across sources suggests stable and efficient market pricing for this fixture, with no meaningful divergence to flag.
